verdicts.reasoning: The homepage describes Aircall as a cloud phone system and call center platform, aligning with the recorded description.
The developer documentation confirms the use of OAuth2 and personal access tokens, supporting the recorded auth methods.
The documentation states that developers can register apps and obtain credentials after signing up, confirming the self-serve free access.
The API documentation indicates that the API is RESTful and exposes an OpenAPI JSON, confirming the recorded API surface.
The information provided supports that the API is buildable with key signup, as it requires account signup and app credential creation.
